description: Audio Experience Foundation™ — taxonomy for Estate sound. Categories describe purpose, not playlists.

itemSchema.label: string — member-safe name
itemSchema.description: string — what this kind of audio is for

categories.label: Focus & calm
categories.description: Gentle soundscapes that support thinking without demanding attention.

categories.label: Room atmosphere
categories.description: Audio that belongs to a specific place on the Estate — piano, hearth, rain at the window.

categories.label: Restoration
categories.description: Soft sound for recovery, overwhelm, or when the mind needs less.

categories.label: Creative companionship
categories.description: Warm audio company while making, drafting, or exploring ideas.

categories.label: Nature listening
categories.description: Rain, paths, gardens — outdoor calm without leaving the Estate.

categories.label: Seasonal ambience
categories.description: Sound that shifts with the season — future full library expansion.
